creator: tilman.blumhagen@googlemail.com
text:
When you first install graphics/blender and then editors/libreoffice you get an error that the installed hdf5 conflicts with the installed one which was  required as an depenency to openiomagio. When you then run "pkg_delete -r hdf5*", install libreoffice and install blender again everything works fine. So it seems openimageio has an old hdf5 as dependency but can live with the new one required by libreoffice (precisely its thats dependency vigra which pulls in hpf5). Suggested fix: Update dependency in openimageio to hdf5-18.

How-To-Repeat: - make sure hdf5 is not installed
- portmaster graphics/openimageio
- portmaster graphics/vigra

This should fail with a message that the required version of hpf5 conflicts with the installed version.
